features: Preserve the existing null-guard on `$session` and the 100-entry blacklist cap unchanged

criteria.name: broken_method_calls_removed
criteria.description: The strings `$session->get(` and `$session->set(` do not appear anywhere within the body of the `handleVote()` method in `user/plugins/roadmap/roadmap.php` after the fix is applied. Occurrences outside `handleVote()` are out of scope for this sprint and must not cause this criterion to fail.

criteria.name: correct_property_read_present
criteria.description: `$session->bv_used_vote_nonces ?? []` is present in `handleVote()` as the nonce blacklist read expression, replacing the former `$session->get(...)` call at the same logical position

criteria.name: correct_property_write_present
criteria.description: `$session->bv_used_vote_nonces = $usedNonces` is present in `handleVote()` as the nonce blacklist write statement, replacing the former `$session->set(...)` call at the same logical position

criteria.name: no_fatal_error_on_vote
criteria.description: An authenticated POST to the vote endpoint returns HTTP 200 with no PHP fatal error in the response body or server error log (previously crashed with `Call to undefined method Grav\Common\Session::get()`)

criteria.name: add_vote_increments_yaml
criteria.description: After a valid authenticated vote-add request, the target roadmap item's `vote_count` in `user/data/flex-objects/roadmap-items.yaml` is incremented by exactly 1

criteria.name: remove_vote_decrements_yaml
criteria.description: After a valid authenticated vote-remove request from the same user who previously voted, the target roadmap item's `vote_count` in `user/data/flex-objects/roadmap-items.yaml` is decremented by exactly 1. Additionally, `vote_count` must not be written as a value below 0 under any circumstances (floor is 0).

criteria.name: null_guard_preserved
criteria.description: The null-guard on `$session` (the `$session ? ... : []` conditional) remains intact in `handleVote()`; the method does not throw when `$session` is null

criteria.name: blacklist_cap_preserved
criteria.description: The 100-entry cap on the `$usedNonces` blacklist array remains intact; the array is sliced/trimmed to a maximum of 100 entries before being written back to the session. Verified by code inspection: the slice/trim call is present and unchanged immediately before the property-write assignment.

criteria.name: nonce_replay_rejected
criteria.description: A second POST request reusing the same nonce within the same session is rejected with either a non-2xx HTTP status code or a JSON response body containing an explicit error indicator (e.g., an `error` key with a non-empty string value). A plain HTTP 200 with an empty or success body does NOT satisfy this criterion. The blacklist must persist across requests within a single session lifetime.

criteria.name: first_vote_no_nonce_history
criteria.description: When no `bv_used_vote_nonces` property exists on the session yet (i.e., a brand-new session with no prior vote activity), a valid authenticated vote-add request succeeds with HTTP 200 and `vote_count` increments by 1, confirming that the `?? []` fallback correctly initialises an empty array without errors.

criteria.name: nonce_blacklist_persists_in_session
criteria.description: After a successful vote request, the `bv_used_vote_nonces` property is readable on the session object in a subsequent request within the same session (verified either via a debug/introspection endpoint, a server-side log statement in a test build, or by the nonce-replay-rejection test implicitly confirming persistence), confirming the property-write assignment persisted.

criteria.name: security_groups_a_to_f_pass
criteria.description: All previously passing security tests in Groups A–F of `security/04-voting-endpoint-tests.md` continue to pass with no regressions after the fix is applied. This criterion is only evaluated if `security/04-voting-endpoint-tests.md` exists and explicitly defines Groups A–F; if the file is absent the criterion must be flagged as blocked rather than skipped silently.

criteria.name: no_other_files_modified
criteria.description: Only `user/plugins/roadmap/roadmap.php` is changed; no templates, YAML data files, other plugin files, or theme files are modified in this sprint. Verified via `git diff --name-only` showing exactly one file.

criteria.name: change_is_minimal
criteria.description: The diff for `user/plugins/roadmap/roadmap.php` contains no more than 4 changed lines (2 deletions + 2 insertions) when measured with `git diff --unified=0 | grep -E '^[+-]' | grep -v '^[+-]{3}'`, confirming no unintended logic changes were introduced. Whitespace-only or comment-only lines beyond this limit must also be justified.
